_note: PokeMMO ball multipliers. Flat balls carry a fixed 'rate'; conditional balls carry a 'rule' name resolved by catch_calc.ball_multiplier against a BattleContext. Flat balls and the core formula verified against pokemmo.help/capture-chance (e.g. Roselia rate 150, 50% HP, Poke -> 39.21%). Conditional formulas from pokemmo.help + the PokeMMO catch calculator (c4vv/CatchCalc); see docs/hub_validation.md. Luxury corrected to 1.0 (Hub had 2.0; Luxury affects friendship, not catch rate). Dream Ball is NOT flat 4.0 (Hub was wrong): it scales with consecutive sleep turns per the PokeMMO capture calculator -- 0/1/2/3 turns -> 1x/1.5x/2.5x/4x (capped), so 1x with no sleep. Repeat's exact rule is unconfirmed (chain count) so it stays 1.0 until verified in-game.
